name: Bankr
description: Onchain trading agent on Base. Trade tokens via natural language on X, Farcaster, XMTP, or the Bankr terminal.
external_note: No public XMTP address found. Bankr is reachable on X (@bankrbot), Farcaster, or bankr.bot/terminal.

name: gitlawb
description: Decentralized git network for AI agents — repos on IPFS+Filecoin+Arweave, peer connectivity via libp2p, DID+UCAN auth. SIGNA's agent exposes gitlawb_list_repos / gitlawb_get_repo / gitlawb_list_prs read tools (require GITLAWB_DID + GITLAWB_KEY env vars on the agent runtime).
external_note: Read MCP tools wired into the SIGNA agent. Setup required: see https://gitlawb.com/agents.

name: AEON
description: Modular crypto payment protocol for AI agents — hosted cashier, subscription checkout, cross-chain pay. Built for autonomous agent commerce; recently added ERC-8004 verifiable agent identity.
external_note: AEON ships payment/checkout SDKs. The 'sign in with AEON' option requested in the v1 brief isn't a product they offer; surfaced here as a verified-partner directory entry instead.

name: MiroShark
description: Swarm intelligence simulation engine — spawn hundreds of agents to simulate public reaction across Twitter, Reddit, and prediction markets. Self-hosted Python+Vue.
external_note: Option A integration (directory entry). TODO: Option B = webhook bridge where MiroShark sims POST simulated agent messages to a SIGNA group chat. Requires a small inbound Express endpoint + MiroShark-side config + a destination group conv.
